stemHtml: How are high level condensation trails formed that are to be found occasionally behind jet aircraft?

options.a: In conditions of low humidity, through the particles of soot contained in the exhaust gases
options.b: Only through unburnt fuel in the exhaust gases
options.c: Through a decrease in pressure, and the associated adiabatic drop in temperature at the wing tips while flying through relatively warm but humid air
options.d: Through water vapour released during fuel combustion
